text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 TankerTrackers: A non-Iranian VLCC supertanker, capable of carrying around “2 million barrels” of crude and sanctioned by the US OFAC, has entered Iranian waters via the Strait of Hormuz with AIS active. The movement was identified and verified through maritime tracking data, indicating continued activity by sanctioned vessels despite CENTCOM measures. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 TankerTrackers：一艘非伊朗籍的超大型原油运输船（VLCC），载油量约为“200万桶”原油，且受到美国海外资产控制办公室（OFAC）制裁，在AIS开启的情况下通过霍尔木兹海峡进入伊朗水域。该动向已通过海事追踪数据识别并核实，表明尽管有中央司令部的措施，受制裁船只仍在持续活动。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇦 🇺🇸 Ukrainian President Zelenskyy confirmed that U.S. Special Envoy Witkoff and Jared Kushner will visit Ukraine, however a date hasn’t been agreed upon yet. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇦 🇺🇸 乌克兰总统泽连斯基证实，美国特使威特科夫（Witkoff）和贾里德·库什纳（Jared Kushner）将访问乌克兰，但尚未商定具体日期。 @wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 Empires fall, but true civilization endures.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 帝国终会陨落，但真正的文明永存。

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Fox News: US President Donald Trump says the war is “very close to over” when asked by Fox News anchor Maria Bartiromo whether the conflict has ended. He adds that if the US “pulled up stakes right now, it would take them 20 years to rebuild that country.” Trump says “we’re not finished” and suggests Iran “want to make a deal very badly.” @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 福克斯新闻：当福克斯新闻主播玛丽亚·巴蒂罗莫（Maria Bartiromo）询问冲突是否已经结束时，美国总统唐纳德·特朗普表示战争“非常接近结束”。他补充说，如果美国“现在撤出，他们需要20年才能重建那个国家”。特朗普表示“我们还没有完成”，并暗示伊朗“非常渴望达成协议”。 @wfwitness

text: Open Source Intel U.S. Central Command (CENTCOM): "U.S. Navy guided-missile destroyers are among the assets executing a blockade mission impacting Iranian ports. The blockade is being enforced impartially against vessels of all nations entering or leaving coastal areas or ports in Iran. A typical destroyer has a crew of more than 300 Sailors that are highly trained in conducting offensive and defensive maritime operations." tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 美国中央司令部（CENTCOM）：“美国海军导弹驱逐舰是执行影响伊朗港口封锁任务的资产之一。该封锁对所有进出伊朗沿海地区或港口的各国船只一视同仁。一艘典型的驱逐舰拥有超过300名受过高度训练、能够执行进攻和防御性海上行动的水兵。” 推文

text: Open Source Intel Trump on Iran war: I mean, I view it as very close to over. If I pulled up stakes right now, it would take them 20 years to rebuild that country. And we're not finished. We'll see what happens. I think they want to make a deal very badly. Contributed by @AZ_Intel_ . https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044217371305382221/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 特朗普谈伊朗战争：我的意思是，我认为它非常接近结束。如果我现在撤出，他们需要20年才能重建那个国家。而且我们还没有完成。我们会看看会发生什么。我认为他们非常渴望达成协议。由 @AZ_Intel_ 提供。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044217371305382221/video/1 推文

text: WarMonitor This isn’t new. Back in 2016, Trump attacked Pope Francis, calling his comments “disgraceful” and accusing him of not “understanding” the U.S., showing this isn’t limited to just Pope Leo XIV. tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 这并不新鲜。早在2016年，特朗普就曾攻击教皇方济各，称他的言论“可耻”，并指责他不“理解”美国，这表明这种情况不仅限于教皇利奥十四世。 推文

text: The Spectator Index US military says that no Iranian ships were allowed to pass through blockade and that '6 merchant vessels complied with direction from U.S. forces to turn around'. tweet
text_zh: The Spectator Index 美国军方表示，没有伊朗船只被允许通过封锁线，并且“6艘商船听从了美国军队的指示掉头离开”。 推文

text: OSINTdefender Two Iranian crude oil tankers attempting to depart the Port of Chabahar on the Gulf of Oman were intercepted by a U.S. Navy Arleigh Burke-class guided-missile destroyer earlier today, who ordered the tankers to turn around and return to port via radio communication channels, officials tell Reuters. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 据路透社援引官员的话称，今天早些时候，一艘美国海军阿利·伯克级导弹驱逐舰拦截了两艘试图离开阿曼湾恰巴哈尔港的伊朗原油油轮，并通过无线电通信频道命令这些油轮掉头返回港口。 推文

text: Open Source Intel U.S. Southern Command: "On April 14, at the direction of SOUTHCOM commander Gen. Francis L. Donovan, Joint Task Force Southern Spear conducted a lethal kinetic strike on a vessel operated by Designated Terrorist Organizations. Intelligence confirmed the vessel was transiting along known narco-trafficking routes in the Eastern Pacific and was engaged in narco-trafficking operations. Four male narco-terrorists were killed during this action. No U.S. military forces were harmed." tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 美国南方司令部：“4月14日，在南方司令部司令弗朗西斯·L·多诺万（Francis L. Donovan）将军的指挥下，南方之矛联合特遣部队对一艘由指定恐怖组织运营的船只进行了致命的动能打击。情报证实，该船只正沿着东太平洋已知的毒品走私路线航行，并参与了毒品走私活动。在此次行动中，四名男性毒品恐怖分子被击毙。没有美国军事力量受到伤害。” 推文

text: Faytuks News From watching this video you'd get the impression that Trump explicitly said "the war is over". What he really said, per Maria's own transcription, was: "I think it’s close to over. Yeah. I mean I view it as very close to over" 🚨 BREAKING NEWS: President Donald J. Trump speaks on the Iran conflict tomorrow on Mornings with Maria at 6AM ET. Tune in. @MariaBartiromo @FoxBusiness @POTUS @WhiteHouse https://twitter.com/MorningsMaria/status/2044165023929430217/video/1 - Mornings with Maria tweet
text_zh: Faytuks News 从观看这段视频中，你会得到特朗普明确表示“战争结束了”的印象。但根据玛丽亚自己的转录，他真正说的是：“我认为它接近结束了。是的。我的意思是，我认为它非常接近结束了” 🚨 突发新闻：唐纳德·J·特朗普总统将于明天美国东部时间上午6点在《玛丽亚早间新闻》节目中谈论伊朗冲突。敬请收看。 @MariaBartiromo @FoxBusiness @POTUS @WhiteHouse https://twitter.com/MorningsMaria/status/2044165023929430217/video/1 - 玛丽亚早间新闻 推文

text: OSINTtechnical Newly released photo of a USAF B-21 Raider stealth bomber conducting aerial refueling testing. https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2044215433025167451/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTtechnical 新发布的美国空军B-21突袭者隐形轰炸机进行空中加油测试的照片。 https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2044215433025167451/photo/1 推文

text: U.S. Central Command U.S. Navy guided-missile destroyers are among the assets executing a blockade mission impacting Iranian ports. The blockade is being enforced impartially against vessels of all nations entering or leaving coastal areas or ports in Iran. A typical destroyer has a crew of more than 300 Sailors that are highly trained in conducting offensive and defensive maritime operations. tweet
text_zh: 美国中央司令部 美国海军导弹驱逐舰是执行影响伊朗港口封锁任务的资产之一。该封锁对所有进出伊朗沿海地区或港口的各国船只一视同仁。一艘典型的驱逐舰拥有超过300名受过高度训练、能够执行进攻和防御性海上行动的水兵。 推文

text: WarMonitor Maybe someone said it was a “doctored image,” and Trump took that to mean he should tell the press he was a doctor in it. Either way, most people aren’t buying it. Karoline Leavitt: “President Trump’s Truth Social post depicting him as Jesus was a doctored image.” HE JUST FUCKING ADMITTED HE POSTED IT!!!! - ThePatrioticBlonde 🇺🇸 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 也许有人说那是一张“伪造的图片”，特朗普认为这意味着他应该告诉媒体他在图片里是个医生。无论如何，大多数人并不买账。卡罗琳·莱维特（Karoline Leavitt）：“特朗普总统发布在Truth Social上将他描绘成耶稣的帖子是一张伪造的图片。” 他刚刚该死地承认了他发布了它！！！！ - ThePatrioticBlonde 🇺🇸 推文

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 NYT: More than 12 U.S. military vessels are enforcing the U.S. maritime blockade of the Strait of Hormuz. A U.S. official added that over 20 commercial vessels that weren’t linked to Iran transited the Strait in the first 24 hours of the blockade. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 纽约时报：超过12艘美国军舰正在执行美国对霍尔木兹海峡的海上封锁。一位美国官员补充说，在封锁的前24小时内，有超过20艘与伊朗无关的商船通过了海峡。 @wfwitness

text: 🚢 According to Tanker Trackers, a non-Iranian VLCC supertanker successfully transited the straight with her AIS on. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🚢 据Tanker Trackers称，一艘非伊朗籍的超大型原油运输船（VLCC）在开启AIS的情况下成功通过了海峡。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to Lebanese News and Updates: "🇮🇱l🇱🇧 According to the interrogation transcripts, during a conversation between agent Elie D. and his Mossad handler Mark," The government would have attested 10x more Israeli spies if it dedicated any teams or units for funds for it. They simply do not care. Full video here: https://youtu.be/lML4JZVHyG8
text_zh: ↩️ 回复黎巴嫩新闻与更新：“🇮🇱l🇱🇧 根据审讯记录，在特工Elie D.和他的摩萨德联络人Mark之间的对话中，” 如果政府投入任何团队或单位的资金，本可以查出多出10倍的以色列间谍。他们根本不在乎。完整视频在这里：https://youtu.be/lML4JZVHyG8

text: 🇮🇱 l 🇱🇧 According to the interrogation transcripts, during a conversation between agent Elie D. and his Mossad handler Mark, Elie says: "We wish Israel could eliminate Hezbullah." To which Mossad agent Mark replies: "Not just Hezbullah, we have to eliminate all Muslims in the world, and Shiites in particular."
text_zh: 🇮🇱 l 🇱🇧 根据审讯记录，在特工Elie D.和他的摩萨德联络人Mark之间的对话中，Elie说：“我们希望以色列能消灭真主党。” 摩萨德特工Mark回答说：“不仅仅是真主党，我们必须消灭世界上所有的穆斯林，尤其是什叶派。”

text: 🇺🇸 Legendary whistleblower Chelsea Manning perp walked by a cop named “Anger” after arrest at a protest against the Iran War in NYC today
text_zh: 🇺🇸 传奇举报人切尔西·曼宁（Chelsea Manning）今天在纽约抗议伊朗战争的示威活动中被捕后，被一名叫“愤怒”（Anger）的警察押送

text: WarMonitor Another tanker has passed through the Strait of Hormuz after departing an Iranian port, according to ship-tracking data, while a separate firm reports at least nine vessels have transited since yesterday, including at least two U.S.-sanctioned tankers with ties to Iran. https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2044210122155598139/video/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 据船舶追踪数据显示，另一艘油轮在离开伊朗港口后通过了霍尔木兹海峡，而另一家公司报告称，自昨天以来至少有九艘船只通过，其中包括至少两艘与伊朗有联系的受美国制裁的油轮。 https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2044210122155598139/video/1 推文

text: OSINTdefender The U.S. Air Force released photos a B-21 Raider being refueled by a KC-135 Stratotanker during ongoing testing and evaluation at Edwards Air Force Base in California. https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2044210056250429779/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 美国空军发布了B-21突袭者在加利福尼亚州爱德华兹空军基地进行持续测试和评估期间由KC-135同温层加油机加油的照片。 https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2044210056250429779/photo/1 推文

text: Instant News Alerts A U.S. destroyer interdicted two oil tankers attempting to leave Iran on Tuesday and instructed them to turn around. The ships had left Chabahar port on the Gulf of Oman and were contacted via radio communication. (Reuters) tweet
text_zh: Instant News Alerts 一艘美国驱逐舰周二拦截了两艘试图离开伊朗的油轮，并指示它们掉头。这些船只离开了阿曼湾的恰巴哈尔港，并通过无线电通信进行了联系。（路透社） 推文

text: Nuno Felix RT @TheAviationist : Italian Air Force’s Raiders Wing Becomes First NATO Unit Accredited by AFSOC for Global Access Operations The certification makes the 17th Stormo the first NATO unit recognized by AFSOC for a Combat Control-centered capability that enables air operations in austere, remote or hostile environments. Story: https://theaviationist.com/2026/04/14/italian-air-forces-raiders-afsoc/ tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 转推 @TheAviationist ：意大利空军突袭者联队成为首个获得美国空军特种作战司令部（AFSOC）全球准入行动认证的北约部队。该认证使第17联队成为首个被AFSOC认可的北约部队，具备以战斗控制为核心的能力，能够在严峻、偏远或敌对环境中进行空中作战。报道：https://theaviationist.com/2026/04/14/italian-air-forces-raiders-afsoc/ 推文

text: Nuno Felix RT @lovat1942 : No olvidemos que Portugal, lleva ya cerca de una década, con despliegues continuados y rotaciones continuadas en RCA La dureza y la exigencia de África en su máxima expresión Grande Portugal Los Uro vamtac del jercito Portugues en la ruta de Bangui–Mbaïki–Moungoumba, en la República Centro-Africana. #Africa #Portugal https://twitter.com/jmscaronte/status/2043903069335798159/photo/1 - julio ⚡️ Caronte tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 转推 @lovat1942 ：别忘了葡萄牙已经在中非共和国（RCA）进行了近十年的持续部署和轮换。非洲的严酷和要求得到了最充分的体现。伟大的葡萄牙。葡萄牙军队的Uro Vamtac车辆在中非共和国班吉–姆拜基–蒙贡巴路线上。 #非洲 #葡萄牙 https://twitter.com/jmscaronte/status/2043903069335798159/photo/1 - julio ⚡️ Caronte 推文

text: OSINTtechnical A US Navy destroyer intercepted two oil tankers departing the Iranian port of Chabahar yesterday, ordering them to turn back over radio -Reuters https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2044204120312017065/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTtechnical 一艘美国海军驱逐舰昨天拦截了两艘离开伊朗恰巴哈尔港的油轮，并通过无线电命令它们掉头 -路透社 https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2044204120312017065/photo/1 推文

text: OSINTdefender U.S. Marines with Maritime Raid Force, 31st Marine Expeditionary Unit (MEU), conduct routine training aboard the forward-deployed amphibious assault ship USS Tripoli (LHA-7) in the Arabian Sea, April 11, 2026. The 31st MEU is deployed to support maritime security and stability in the U.S. Central Command area of responsibility. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 美国海军陆战队第31海军陆战远征部队（MEU）的海上突袭部队于2026年4月11日在阿拉伯海的前沿部署两栖攻击舰的黎波里号（LHA-7）上进行例行训练。第31海军陆战远征部队被部署以支持美国中央司令部责任区的海上安全与稳定。 推文

text: The Christian of south Lebanon will eventually regret this /172126?single
text_zh: 黎巴嫩南部的基督徒最终会后悔的 /172126?single

text: 🌟 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 According to Hind Rajab Foundation co-founder Dyab Abou Jahjah, Daniel Ella—commander of the 52nd Battalion, Israel’s 401st Brigade—was severely injured in clashes with Hezbollah today. He led the unit responsible for the killing of 5-year-old Hind Rajab in Gaza, in January 2024.
text_zh: 🌟 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 据Hind Rajab基金会联合创始人Dyab Abou Jahjah称，以色列第401旅第52营指挥官丹尼尔·埃拉（Daniel Ella）今天在与真主党的冲突中受重伤。他领导的部队曾于2024年1月在加沙杀害了5岁的Hind Rajab。

text: ⚡️ 🇨🇦 🇦🇺 🇧🇷 🇨🇴 🇮🇩 🇯🇵 🇯🇴 🇸🇱 🇨🇭 🇬🇧 🇱🇧 A group of countries including Canada, Australia, Japan, and the United Kingdom issued a joint statement calling for the protection of humanitarian workers in Lebanon amid worsening conditions. The countries urged an end to hostilities, stressed the need to protect civilians and aid personnel, and condemned attacks that have killed UN peacekeepers and increased risks for humanitarian workers. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇨🇦 🇦🇺 🇧🇷 🇨🇴 🇮🇩 🇯🇵 🇯🇴 🇸🇱 🇨🇭 🇬🇧 🇱🇧 包括加拿大、澳大利亚、日本和英国在内的一组国家发表联合声明，呼吁在黎巴嫩局势恶化的情况下保护人道主义工作者。这些国家敦促结束敌对行动，强调保护平民和援助人员的必要性，并谴责导致联合国维和人员死亡并增加人道主义工作者风险的袭击。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 U.S. Vice President Vance says that U.S. President Trump is presenting Iran with a grand bargain. "[Trump] said that 'if you're willing to act like a normal country, we are willing to treat you economically like a normal country.' He doesn't want a small deal. And that's that's that's one of the reasons why I won. I'd say in Pakistan, we made a ton of progress. But the reason why the deal is not yet done is because the president, he really wants a deal where Iran doesn't have a nuclear weapon, Iran is not state sponsoring terrorism, but also the people of Iran can thrive and prosper prosper and join the world economy. And that's that's the trade that he's offering. He's saying if you guys he said if you guys commit to not having a nuclear weapon, we are gonna make Iran thrive. We're gonna make it economically prosperous, and we're gonna invite the Iranian people into the world economy in a way they haven't been in my entire life. And that's the kind of Trumpian grand bargain that the president has put on the table." @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国副总统万斯表示，美国总统特朗普正在向伊朗提出一项大交易。“[特朗普]说，‘如果你愿意像一个正常的国家一样行事，我们愿意在经济上像对待一个正常的国家一样对待你。’ 他不想要一个小交易。这就是我获胜的原因之一。我想在巴基斯坦，我们取得了巨大的进展。但协议尚未达成的原因是总统，他真的想要一个伊朗没有核武器、不资助恐怖主义，而且伊朗人民能够茁壮成长、繁荣并加入世界经济的协议。这就是他提供的交易。他说，如果你们承诺不拥有核武器，我们将使伊朗繁荣昌盛。我们将使它在经济上繁荣，并将以我一生中从未有过的方式邀请伊朗人民进入世界经济。这就是总统摆在桌面上的那种特朗普式的宏大交易。” @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to ResistanceTrench mirror: "🇺🇸 🇮🇱 “I recognize that a lot of young voters don’t love the policy that we have in the Middle East (West Asia). I’m not saying you have to agree with me on every issue, what I’m saying is don’t get disengaged because you disagree with the administration on…" 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 A shout from one of the audience: “You are killing children”
text_zh: ↩️ 回复ResistanceTrench镜像：“🇺🇸 🇮🇱 “我承认很多年轻选民不喜欢我们在中东（西亚）的政策。我不是说你必须在每个问题上都同意我，我想说的是，不要因为你不同意政府的……就变得不参与。” 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 观众中的一声大喊：“你们在杀害儿童”

The ships had left Chabahar port on the Gulf of Oman and were contacted by the warship via radio communication… »

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 Reuters: A U.S. destroyer has interdicted two oil tankers attempting to leave Iran, a day after U.S. President Trump's blockade went into effect. The ships had left Chabahar port on the Gulf of Oman and were contacted by the warship via radio communication, with a U.S. official stating that they were instructed to turn around. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 路透社：在美国总统特朗普的封锁生效一天后，一艘美国驱逐舰拦截了两艘试图离开伊朗的油轮。这些船只离开了阿曼湾的恰巴哈尔港，并被军舰通过无线电通信联系上，一位美国官员表示，它们被指示掉头。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics: ""Soon guess who barges inside the room? Tweedledee and Tweedledum! Witkoff and Kushner, with messages from Netanyahu. And after that, there was a phone call from Netanyahu to Vance. After that, the whole thing started to derail." Pepe Escobar on DD Geopolitics…" "The Houthis are just waiting for the right moment to announce: 'Yes, that's it, we're going to block it all.' From Hormuz to Suez to Bab el-Mandeb and back to Hormuz—it's a perfect triangle. Some Yemenis are calling it the Alaqsa Triangle blockade." Pepe Escobar warns of looming multi-strait blockade across Red Sea and Persian Gulf. The U.S. Navy faces "round two" with Ansarullah if Yemen closes the triangle. "Who the hell in the National Security Council has the balls to make a 20-second visual presentation to the president proving this is completely suicidal?" FULL EPISODE !! 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: ↩️ 回复DD Geopolitics：“”很快猜猜谁闯进了房间？叮当和叮当！威特科夫和库什纳，带着内塔尼亚胡的信息。在那之后，内塔尼亚胡给万斯打了一个电话。在那之后，整个事情就开始脱轨了。” 佩佩·埃斯科巴（Pepe Escobar）在DD Geopolitics上……” “胡塞武装只是在等待合适的时机宣布：‘是的，就是这样，我们要把它全部封锁。’ 从霍尔木兹到苏伊士，再到曼德海峡，最后回到霍尔木兹——这是一个完美的三角形。一些也门人称之为阿克萨三角封锁。” 佩佩·埃斯科巴警告红海和波斯湾即将发生多海峡封锁。如果也门关闭这个三角形，美国海军将面临与安萨尔真主党的“第二轮”较量。“国家安全委员会里到底有谁有胆量向总统做一个20秒的视觉演示，证明这是完全自杀的行为？” 完整剧集！！ 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 “I recognize that a lot of young voters don’t love the policy that we have in the Middle East (West Asia). I’m not saying you have to agree with me on every issue, what I’m saying is don’t get disengaged because you disagree with the administration on one topic. Get more involved” — Vance - > Netanyahu said: “Vance, on his way back from Islamabad, reported to me – as he does every day.” If you side with Vance, you’re siding with Netanyahu, the child killer.
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 “我承认很多年轻选民不喜欢我们在中东（西亚）的政策。我不是说你必须在每个问题上都同意我，我想说的是，不要因为你在一个话题上不同意政府的观点就变得不参与。多参与进来” — 万斯 - > 内塔尼亚胡说：“万斯在从伊斯兰堡回来的路上向我汇报——就像他每天做的那样。” 如果你站在万斯一边，你就是站在杀害儿童的内塔尼亚胡一边。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡🇺🇸🇮🇷 A US Navy maritime patrol MQ-4C drone may have crashed at around 10h15 UTC in the Persian gulf. After a routine patrol over the strait of Hormuz the drone headed back to its base in Italy. The drone then declared emergency and turned to the gulf while…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 The U.S. Navy has confirmed that an MQ-4C crashed on April 9th. The location of the crash wasn't indicated in the document due to operational security concerns. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复WarFront Witness：“⚡🇺🇸🇮🇷 一架美国海军海上巡逻MQ-4C无人机可能于世界标准时间10点15分左右在波斯湾坠毁。在霍尔木兹海峡进行例行巡逻后，该无人机返回其在意大利的基地。随后该无人机宣布紧急情况并转向海湾，同时……” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国海军已证实一架MQ-4C于4月9日坠毁。由于作战安全考虑，文件中未说明坠毁地点。 @wfwitness

text: 🇮🇶 🇺🇸 ⚡️ The State Department’s Rewards for Justice program released a photo it claims shows Ahmad al-Hamidawi, leader of Kataib Hezbollah, offering up to $10M for information. Just a reminder: the US has not yet paid the person who ratted out Maduro.
text_zh: 🇮🇶 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 国务院的“正义奖赏”计划发布了一张照片，声称是真主党旅领导人艾哈迈德·哈米达维（Ahmad al-Hamidawi），并悬赏高达1000万美元征集信息。提醒一下：美国还没有支付给举报马杜罗的那个人钱。

text: 🔄 Forwarded from Free Palestine TV تلفزيون تحرير فلسطين: The People of Lebanon Rally Against Normalization Hadi Hoteit and Evan Katsounis visit a recent rally staged at the Government Palace in Beirut against the unprecedented direct talks between the Lebanese proxy regime of Nawaf Shalom and the Zionist Entity amidst its genocidal campaign on the region. The two interview supporters of the resistance and families displaced by the Jewish invasion of South Lebanon. Filmed on: 11/4/2026 Producer: Laith Marouf Editor: Rabih Ghannam & Ali Hayek Donate/Watch/Share elsewhere 👇 https://www.FreePalestine.Video
text_zh: 🔄 转发自Free Palestine TV تلفزيون تحرير فلسطين：黎巴嫩人民反对正常化集会 哈迪·霍泰特（Hadi Hoteit）和埃文·卡苏尼斯（Evan Katsounis）参观了最近在贝鲁特政府宫举行的集会，反对纳瓦夫·沙洛姆（Nawaf Shalom）的黎巴嫩代理政权与犹太复国主义实体之间史无前例的直接会谈，而此时该实体正在该地区进行种族灭绝运动。两人采访了抵抗运动的支持者和因犹太入侵黎巴嫩南部而流离失所的家庭。拍摄日期：2026年4月11日 制片人：莱斯·马鲁夫（Laith Marouf） 编辑：拉比·加纳姆（Rabih Ghannam）和阿里·哈耶克（Ali Hayek） 捐赠/观看/分享请点击下方 👇 https://www.FreePalestine.Video

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇷 Alleged reports from opposition media of two strong explosions in west Tehran, coinciding with reports of a car bombing. Reports, from opposition outlets, suggest a car bomb went off in the Jeyhoun area near Goli intersection, targeting the Imam Khomeini…" ⚡️ 🇮🇷 Iranian state media IRIB reports that the explosion reported earlier was from a homemade sound device planted by saboteurs in Tehran's tenth district. They allege the saboteurs planned on causing far and distress amongst civilians there. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇷 反对派媒体据称报道德黑兰西部发生两次强烈爆炸，与汽车炸弹袭击的报道相吻合。来自反对派媒体的报道称，在Goli十字路口附近的Jeyhoun地区发生了一起汽车炸弹爆炸，目标是霍梅尼……” ⚡️ 🇮🇷 伊朗国家媒体IRIB报道称，早些时候报道的爆炸是由破坏分子在德黑兰第十区放置的自制发声装置引起的。他们声称破坏分子计划在那里引起平民的恐慌和不安。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to Clash Report: "JD Vance:The person who is effectively running Iran sat across from the Vice President of the U.S.—that had never happened." He contradicted himself He literally said yesterday Iran had to leave back to Tehran to ask the real leadership about making a deal
text_zh: ↩️ 回复Clash Report：“JD万斯：实际上管理伊朗的人坐在美国副总统对面——这从未发生过。” 他自相矛盾了，他昨天明明说伊朗必须回到德黑兰去问真正的领导层关于达成协议的事

text: JD Vance: Trump says to Iran: “If you commit to not having a nuclear weapon, we are going to make Iran economically thrive.”
text_zh: JD万斯：特朗普对伊朗说：“如果你承诺不拥有核武器，我们将使伊朗在经济上繁荣昌盛。”

text: JD Vance: I recognize that a lot of young voters don’t love the policy we have in the Middle East.
text_zh: JD万斯：我承认很多年轻选民不喜欢我们在中东的政策。

text: VP Vance was confronted at a TPUSA event: “You’re killing children!”
text_zh: 副总统万斯在TPUSA活动上遭到质问：“你们在杀害儿童！”

text: 🇺🇸 $240 million US MQ-4C crashes in Persian Gulf — TWZ. US Navy labels it ‘mishap’ — ‘Suddenly’ disappeared operating over Persian Gulf on April 9.
text_zh: 🇺🇸 2.4亿美元的美国MQ-4C在波斯湾坠毁 — TWZ。美国海军称其为“事故” — 4月9日在波斯湾上空作业时“突然”消失。

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 Trump says Iran war ‘over’ — Maria Bartiromo after a visit to the White House. You never know what Trump will say in the next 30 minutes. He is not the one making the decisions.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 特朗普称伊朗战争“结束” — 玛丽亚·巴蒂罗莫在访问白宫后表示。你永远不知道特朗普在接下来的30分钟内会说什么。他不是做决定的人。

text: ↩️ Reply to ResistanceTrench mirror: "🇮🇷 Explosion in District 10 of Tehran involving a homemade explosive device; minor damage and no casualties. — Shortly before, two homemade explosive devices based on liquefied gas detonated on Imam Khomeini Street (District 10 of Tehran, near Jeyhun). —…" 🇮🇷 The explosion an hour ago in District 10 of Tehran was reportedly linked to sabotage by traitorous agents — IRIB
text_zh: ↩️ 回复ResistanceTrench镜像：“🇮🇷 德黑兰第10区发生爆炸，涉及一个自制爆炸装置；轻微损坏，无人员伤亡。 — 在此之前不久，两个基于液化气的自制爆炸装置在霍梅尼街（德黑兰第10区，靠近Jeyhun）引爆。 —……” 🇮🇷 一小时前在德黑兰第10区发生的爆炸据报道与叛国特工的破坏活动有关 — IRIB

text: ↩️ Reply to Lebanese News and Updates: "A U.S. Navy MQ-4C Triton surveillance drone crashed on April 9 over the Persian Gulf." Notice the other mishaps? How do they happen to the literal U.S air force that set the standards for such jets but never to the Israeli air force
text_zh: ↩️ 回复黎巴嫩新闻与更新：“一架美国海军MQ-4C海神侦察无人机于4月9日在波斯湾上空坠毁。” 注意到其他事故了吗？为什么它们会发生在为这种喷气式飞机设定标准的美国空军身上，却从未发生在以色列空军身上

text: BREAKING! THE WAR ON IRAN IS OVER (according to Trump) "I said to him, Mr President, you keep talking about the war like, was was, was? I said, is it over? He said, it's over, over." — Maria Bartiromo after a visit to the White House 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 突发！伊朗战争结束了（据特朗普所说）“我对他说，总统先生，你一直谈论战争好像，是，是，是？我说，它结束了吗？他说，结束了，结束了。” — 玛丽亚·巴蒂罗莫在访问白宫后表示 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 SOUTHCOM announced that they struck a suspected narcotics trafficking vessel in the Eastern Pacific ocean earlier today. Four narcotics traffickers were killed in the strike. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 南方司令部宣布，他们今天早些时候在东太平洋打击了一艘涉嫌毒品走私的船只。四名毒品走私者在打击中被击毙。 @wfwitness
